2. Reason for Today's Visit — in your own words

Here for my 6-month check-up. My lower back has been sore for a few months so I've been taking Advil and Aleve pretty often for it. Also I've been using my rescue inhaler more than usual — almost every day this past week.

Peanutsthroat swelling — used EpiPen before
